summary: The United States conducted strikes on Iranian missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar locations near the Strait of Hormuz, citing Iranian violations of a ceasefire agreement. Iran retaliated with missile and drone attacks targeting US military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain, including Ali Al-Salem base and the Fifth Fleet headquarters in Manama. Kuwaiti air defenses intercepted hostile projectiles, while explosions were reported in both Kuwait and Bahrain.
key_points: US aircraft struck Iranian missile and drone storage locations and coastal radar sites for violating the Ceasefire Agreement. (Source: @shin_persian/7242)

Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps launched a combined missile and drone operation targeting eight US military infrastructures at Ali Al-Salem base in Kuwait and the Fifth Fleet headquarters at Salman port in Bahrain. (Source: @yediotnews25/131997)
Kuwaiti Air Defenses responded to hostile missile and drone attacks, with the General Staff stating explosion sounds resulted from interceptions. (Source: @shin_persian/7245)
Explosions were reported in Bahrain and Kuwait following Iranian missile launches toward both countries. (Source: @inon_yttach/9185)
US CENTCOM published documentation of US Air Force strikes on Iranian targets in the Strait of Hormuz area following Iranian launches toward a cargo ship. (Source: @New_security8200/202133)

IDF Golani Brigade fighters encountered a Hezbollah militant during a suspect search in the Dir Siran area in south Lebanon, resulting in the death of Sergeant David Hazutt and one lightly wounded soldier. (Source: @inon_yttach/9192)

IDF and Shin Bet killed al-Nukhba deputy platoon commander Walid al-Nia, who commanded the October 7 infiltration into Israeli territory and was involved in directing the kidnapping of Israeli civilians to Gaza. (Source: @New_security8200/202116)

IDF Egoz Unit commandos identified and killed several Hezbollah operatives armed with RPGs in the Nabatieh area, and the Multi-Domain Unit destroyed a Hezbollah rocket launcher in the area. (Source: @manniefabian/58691)

sections.executive_summary: The United States conducted strikes on Iranian missile and drone storage sites and coastal radar locations near the Strait of Hormuz, citing Iranian violations of a ceasefire agreement. Iran retaliated with missile and drone attacks targeting US military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain, including Ali Al-Salem base and the Fifth Fleet headquarters in Manama. Kuwaiti air defenses intercepted hostile projectiles, while explosions were reported in both Kuwait and Bahrain.

points: US aircraft struck Iranian missile and drone storage locations and coastal radar sites for violating the Ceasefire Agreement, according to a POTUS statement. (Source: @shin_persian/7242)

Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps launched a combined missile and drone operation targeting eight US military infrastructures at Ali Al-Salem base in Kuwait and the Fifth Fleet headquarters at Salman port in Bahrain, claiming destruction of these targets. (Source: @yediotnews25/131997)
Iranian missiles were launched toward Kuwait and Bahrain, with explosions reported in both countries. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74465)

An advisor to Iran's Leader of the Islamic Revolution stated that violating the recent MoU will only strengthen Iran's resolve and that the Strait of Hormuz remains under Iran's undisputed management. (Source: @presstv/195993)
Passage through the Strait of Hormuz still requires coordination with the Islamic Revolutionary Guards, according to IRIB. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4466)
Iranian state media reported hits on a communications tower near the city of Sirrik in the south of the country. (Source: @New_security8200/202121)
Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi arrived in Baghdad for an official visit to Iraq and met with the Iraqi president. (Source: @SharghDaily/168564)

IDF Golani Brigade fighters encountered a Hezbollah militant around 02:00 during a suspect search in the Dir Siran area in south Lebanon, resulting in the death of Sergeant David Hazutt, 21, from Ashkelon, a squad commander in Battalion 12, and one lightly wounded soldier. (Source: @inon_yttach/9190)

IDF and Shin Bet killed al-Nukhba deputy platoon commander Walid al-Nia, who commanded the October 7 infiltration of a militant cell into Israeli territory and was involved in directing and transferring instructions to militants during the kidnapping of Israeli civilians to the Gaza Strip. (Source: @New_security8200/202116)

IDF Egoz Unit commandos identified several Hezbollah operatives armed with RPGs operating in the Nabatieh area near the security zone, and the Israeli Air Force carried out strikes on the operatives and their structure. (Source: @manniefabian/58691)
The IDF Multi-Domain Unit struck and destroyed a Hezbollah rocket launcher in the Nabatieh area that posed a threat to forces. (Source: @inon_yttach/9187)

According to the security annex of the Israeli-Lebanese framework agreement, the IDF will enter to verify that the Lebanese Army has indeed dismantled Hezbollah infrastructures in the area, following previous incidents where the Lebanese Army submitted false reports about infrastructure clearance. (Source: @inon_yttach/9193)

IDF forces from the Etzioni Brigade (6th Brigade) under Division 210 killed several armed militants in the security zone in southern Syria, south of the village of Khader, in Israeli-controlled border territory. (Source: @New_security8200/202126)
Prime Minister Netanyahu stated that the Lebanese government showed great courage and that this is a major blow to Iran and Hezbollah. (Source: @almogboker78/17610)

The IDF killed a top commander in Hamas's naval police, Mansour Sami Mahmoud Shahtout, commander of Hamas's naval police in the Central Camps, along with two other naval police operatives traveling with him in a vehicle while armed, in an Israeli strike in the central Gaza Strip on Friday. (Source: @manniefabian/58694)

The IDF stated the naval police operates under Hamas's military wing and advances and directs terror attacks against IDF troops and the State of Israel, and that Shahtout recently worked to advance attacks on Israeli troops. (Source: @manniefabian/58694)
IDF Southern Command forces are deployed in the area in accordance with the agreement and will continue to remove all threats. (Source: @New_security8200/202116)

IDF Golani Brigade fighters encountered a Hezbollah militant around 02:00 during a suspect search in the Dir Siran area in south Lebanon, resulting in the death of Sergeant David Hazutt and one lightly wounded soldier. After the incident, forces conducted searches for the militant and struck targets in the area. (Source: @inon_yttach/9192)

IDF Egoz Unit commandos identified several Hezbollah operatives armed with RPGs operating in the Nabatieh area near the security zone, and the Israeli Air Force carried out strikes on the operatives and their structure to remove the threat to forces. (Source: @manniefabian/58691)
The IDF Multi-Domain Unit struck and destroyed a Hezbollah rocket launcher in the Nabatieh area that posed a threat to forces. (Source: @inon_yttach/9187)

According to the security annex of the Israeli-Lebanese framework agreement, the IDF will enter to verify that the Lebanese Army has indeed dismantled Hezbollah infrastructures, following previous incidents where the Lebanese Army submitted false reports about infrastructure clearance. (Source: @inon_yttach/9193)
Lebanese army detonations were reported in the towns of Al-Mansouri and Froun. (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/373337)
Israeli warplanes were reported flying toward Al-Hermel in the Bekaa Valley with maximum alert status. (Source: @redlinkleb/28788)

IDF forces from the Etzioni Brigade (6th Brigade) under Division 210 identified and killed two armed militants in the security zone in southern Syria, south of the village of Khader, in Israeli-controlled border territory; the two were identified as militants known to the security system. (Source: @inon_yttach/9187)

Iraqi security forces deployed extensively overnight in Baghdad's Green Zone, including tanks, amid a wave of arrest orders against several senior officials on corruption charges. (Source: @asafroz/50811)
Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi arrived in Baghdad for an official visit and met with the Iraqi president. (Source: @SharghDaily/168564)

Several reports and videos emerged of extensive gunfire in Baghdad's Green Zone following reports that Iraqi security forces were attempting to arrest several politicians on corruption charges. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4449)

Kuwaiti Air Defenses responded to hostile missile and drone attacks, with the General Staff of the Army stating that any explosion sounds were the result of interceptions. (Source: @shin_persian/7245)
Explosions were reported in Kuwait following Iranian missile launches toward the country. (Source: @inon_yttach/9186)

Bahrain's Ministry of Foreign Affairs issued a stern condemnation of the Iranian assault, describing the use of ballistic missiles and drones as part of a deliberate pattern of regional aggression and a flagrant violation of its sovereignty. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4453)
Explosions were reported in Bahrain following US strikes on Iran, according to local reports. (Source: @inon_yttach/9185)
Iran's IRGC claimed destruction of the US Fifth Fleet headquarters at Salman port in Bahrain and Ali Al-Salem base in Kuwait in a combined missile and drone operation. (Source: @yediotnews25/131997)

key_developments: US aircraft struck Iranian missile and drone storage locations and coastal radar sites for violating the Ceasefire Agreement, with POTUS warning that continued violations could lead to the end of the Islamic Republic of Iran. (Source: @shin_persian/7242)

Iran's IRGC launched a combined missile and drone operation targeting eight US military infrastructures at Ali Al-Salem base in Kuwait and the Fifth Fleet headquarters at Salman port in Bahrain, claiming destruction of these targets. (Source: @yediotnews25/131997)
Kuwaiti Air Defenses intercepted hostile missile and drone attacks, with explosions reported in both Kuwait and Bahrain following Iranian launches. (Source: @shin_persian/7245)

IDF Golani Brigade Sergeant David Hazutt was killed and one soldier lightly wounded in a Hezbollah militant encounter during a suspect search in the Dir Siran area in south Lebanon. (Source: @inon_yttach/9190)

IDF and Shin Bet killed al-Nukhba deputy platoon commander Walid al-Nia, who commanded the October 7 infiltration into Israeli territory and directed the kidnapping of Israeli civilians to Gaza. (Source: @New_security8200/202116)

IDF Egoz Unit and Israeli Air Force killed several Hezbollah operatives armed with RPGs in the Nabatieh area, and the Multi-Domain Unit destroyed a Hezbollah rocket launcher. (Source: @manniefabian/58691)
US CENTCOM published documentation of US Air Force strikes on Iranian targets in the Strait of Hormuz area following Iranian launches toward a cargo ship. (Source: @New_security8200/202133)
sections.threat_assessment: The conflict has escalated significantly with direct US-Iran military exchanges across multiple Gulf states. The US strikes on Iranian military infrastructure near the Strait of Hormuz and Iran's retaliatory missile and drone attacks on US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain represent a dangerous escalation cycle. Iran's IRGC has asserted control over Strait of Hormuz passage coordination and threatened decisive responses to any further enemy incursions. Simultaneously, active combat operations continue in Lebanon with Hezbollah, in southern Syria, and in Gaza, indicating a multi-front conflict environment with high potential for further escalation.
sections.regional_response: Bahrain formally condemned Iran's ballistic missile and drone attacks as a deliberate pattern of regional aggression and flagrant sovereignty violation, calling for global action to hold Tehran accountable. Kuwait activated air defenses to intercept incoming projectiles. Iraq saw extensive security force deployments in Baghdad's Green Zone amid political tensions and corruption-related arrest operations, while hosting Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi for official talks. Mediators are reportedly in talks with both Iran and the US to reduce tensions, according to Financial Times.
sections.intelligence_notes: The IRGC's assertion of control over Strait of Hormuz passage and the warning that violating ships will face harsher treatment signals potential disruption to global energy shipping. The IDF's verification mechanism under the Lebanese framework agreement reveals persistent distrust of Lebanese Army compliance regarding Hezbollah infrastructure dismantlement. The killing of senior Hamas naval police commander Shahtout and al-Nukhba commander Walid al-Nia demonstrates continued Israeli targeting of operational leadership across multiple theaters. Iranian missile launches from Bandar Abbas toward Bahrain and Kuwait indicate retained long-range strike capability despite US preemptive strikes on storage sites.
